tagline: Full-Stack AI Engineer: Designing robust AI for complex environments
meta_description: Portfolio Félix Mortas - Full-Stack AI Engineer
skills_languages: Programming languages: Python, SQL, JavaScript/HTML/CSS, Dart, R, LaTeX
skills_frameworks: Frameworks: Langgraph & Langchain, Langfuse, Playwright, PySpark, MLFlow, Flutter, Redis
skills_llm: LLMs & Agents: Prompt engineering, Observation & Evaluation, Context management, RAG, Short term & long term memory, MCP, Tools, Sub-agents orchestration
skills_datascience: Data Science: ETL, Supervised & Unsupervised ML, Deepl Learning, MLOps
skills_cicd: CI/CD: GitHub Actions, Google Play, AppStore Connect
skills_external: External services: RevenueCat (Online payment), Firebase (Firestore, Auth), Google AdMob, API (WhatsApp, Outlook, ...)
about_p1: As a Data Scientist from CentralSupélec and an agricultural engineer from ENSAT, I specialize in developing effective and robust AI applications. My distinctive career path combines engineering and research in cutting-edge technology, life sciences, and agriculture. This cross-disciplinary expertise makes me a results-driven engineer with a systemic mindset and a sense of responsible design. Curious, rigorous, and with strong interpersonal skills, I design high-performance AI applications at a controlled cost.
about_p2: Let's transform your complex data into high-performance, systemic AI applications. Reach out to start a conversation about your services transformation.
about_cta: Learn more about my academic and professional background
migration_value: Manual credential management and platform migrations cost enterprises thousands of high-value man-hours and introduce significant security risks. I engineered an autonomous agentic system that automates the end-to-end lifecycle of account email migrations across disparate web ecosystems. This solution transforms a labor-intensive, error-prone manual process into a scalable, "one-click" background operation.
migration_business_1: Operational Efficiency: Reduced manual task duration from hours to minutes, achieving a 95% reduction in human intervention.
migration_business_3: Platform Agnostic: Unlike rigid RPA, this system uses AI-readable DOM reasoning to navigate any modern web interface (SaaS, Banking, Internal Tools) without custom scripts for every site.
migration_business_4: Cost Optimization: Implemented intelligent model routing to balance high-reasoning tasks with cost-effective small LLMs, minimizing API overhead.
whatsapp_title: 🟢 Enterprise WhatsApp AI Concierge & RAG Pipeline
whatsapp_value: Customer service in the hospitality sector often suffers from high overhead and delayed response times. I engineered an autonomous WhatsApp AI Concierge that utilizes Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to provide instant, high-accuracy support. By leveraging a zero-cost, serverless architecture, this system delivers enterprise-grade performance without the burden of recurring infrastructure overhead.
whatsapp_business_1: Zero-OPEX Infrastructure: Architected a purely serverless event-driven system on AWS Lambda, achieving a production-ready deployment with $0 in fixed monthly infrastructure costs.
whatsapp_business_2: 24/7 Automated Revenue Retention: Eliminated booking friction by providing instant responses to complex queries regarding rates, policies, and services, ensuring no lead is lost to response latency.
whatsapp_business_3: Data-Driven Reliability: Implemented a "Fact-First" RAG pipeline, virtually eliminating AI hallucinations by grounding responses in verified, real-time business data.
whatsapp_business_4: Scalable Customer Engagement: Designed to handle high-concurrency message volumes during peak seasons without requiring additional headcount or manual intervention.
carbon_title: 📞 Assessing the Carbon Footprint of Virtual Meetings: A Quantitative Analysis of Camera Usage
carbon_abstract: Abstract: This paper quantifies the carbon emissions related to data consumption during video calls, focusing on the impact of having the camera on versus off. The findings regarding the environmental benefits achieved by turning off cameras during meetings challenge the claims of some prevalent articles. The experiment was carried out using a 4G connection via a cell phone to measure the varying data transfer associated with videos. The outcomes indicate that turning the camera off can halve data consumption and associated carbon emissions, particularly on mobile networks. The paper concludes with recommendations to optimize data usage and reduce the environmental impact during calls.
carbon_comments:
Comments: [v1] 4 pages, 3 figures, submited and accepted as a short paper by IARIA GREEN 2025 with some fixable issues that must be addressed before the article is ready for publication (Scientific and technical; English & punctuation; Sections and presentation flow)
[v2] Corrected with the help of checkmymanuscript.com, and rearrangement of sections and presentation flow
toits_value: Administrative overhead is a silent profit killer. As Treasurer, I engineered a 100% autonomous serverless ecosystem that digitizes the entire member lifecycle—from payment processing to CRM synchronization. By replacing brittle manual entries with an AI-driven pipeline, the organization achieved an institutional-grade administrative workflow with zero recurring labor costs.
toits_business_1: Zero-Cost Scalability: Leveraged a "Free-Tier" architectural design, ensuring the system handles infinite volume growth with $0 in infrastructure overhead.
toits_business_2: Data Integrity & Risk Mitigation: Replaced error-prone manual data entry with AI-validation, resulting in a 100% accurate database for financial auditing.
toits_business_3: Enhanced Member Retention: Instantaneous, multi-channel onboarding (Email & WhatsApp) increased engagement rates by removing the manual processing lag.
toits_business_4: Resource Reallocation: Recaptured precious mental energy, allowing leadership to focus on strategic growth rather than clerical maintenance.
l10n_title: 🌍 Generate L10n – Enterprise AI Engine for Global Software Scaling
l10n_value: Internationalization (L10n) is a primary bottleneck for global product expansion, often requiring hours of manual developer labor. Generate L10n is a professional-grade VSCode ecosystem that leverages Large Language Models to automate the entire localization pipeline—from string extraction to multi-language translation and code integration.
l10n_business_1: Accelerated Time-to-Market: Reduces the localization lifecycle from hours to minutes, allowing for simultaneous global product launches.
l10n_business_2: Drastic Cost Reduction: Minimizes reliance on expensive developer hours for repetitive formatting tasks.
l10n_business_3: Development Velocity: Enables engineers to remain in "flow state" by automating the context-switching between feature development and metadata management.
l10n_business_4: Quality Assurance: Ensures 100% architectural consistency across multi-language assets, reducing the risk of UI breakage or missing translation keys.
flasholator_title: 🧠 Flasholator – Scalable EdTech Engine & Spaced Repetition Platform
flasholator_value: Flasholator is a high-performance mobile platform designed to monetize the intersection of Neural Machine Translation and cognitive science. By transforming instant linguistic queries into long-term data assets via Spaced Repetition, the platform creates a "high-stickiness" ecosystem that maximizes user Lifetime Value and retention.
flasholator_business_1: Multi-Channel Revenue Streams: Engineered a production-ready monetization stack integrating RevenueCat for tiered subscriptions and Google AdMob for ad-revenue diversification.
flasholator_business_2: Market Adaptability: Implemented a 100% automated localization pipeline, allowing for rapid deployment into international markets (EN, FR, ES) with minimal overhead.
flasholator_business_3: Data-Driven Retention: Utilizes a custom SuperMemo-2 implementation to optimize user study intervals, directly correlating to increased Daily Active Users.
flasholator_business_4: Regulatory Compliance: Built with a focus on risk mitigation, featuring full GDPR/UMP compliance and robust data privacy frameworks.
gaia_value: Most AI implementations struggle with "agentic drift"—losing track of complex, multi-step goals. I engineered a sophisticated autonomous coordinator designed to solve the GAIA Benchmark, which mimics real-world office tasks. This system proves that AI can move beyond simple chat interfaces to handle multi-modal data (video, audio, spreadsheets) and execute multi-hour workflows with minimal human oversight.
gaia_business_2: Infrastructural Agility: Developed a model-agnostic routing system that maintains 100% uptime by dynamically switching providers to bypass API outages or rate limits.
gaia_business_3: Cost-Efficient Scaling: Built a custom frame-extraction pipeline for video analysis, achieving high-fidelity reasoning results without the premium costs of native video-to-text APIs.
gaia_business_4: Audit-Ready Transparency: Integrated comprehensive observability to track every "thought" and "action," ensuring all AI decisions are traceable for compliance and quality control.
axa_intro: An intensive 18-month industrial residency at AXA in partnership with CentraleSupélec, focused on bridging the gap between experimental data science and production-grade financial technology.
axa_value: Delivered 9 end-to-end industrial projects designed to convert raw corporate data into actionable predictive assets. By integrating MLOps best practices early in the lifecycle, I reduced the friction between model development and deployment, ensuring that AI solutions provide immediate and measurable business value.
axa_business_1: Reduced Time-to-Market: Architected CI/CD pipelines and automated scoring APIs to accelerate the transition from "Lab" to "Production."
axa_business_2: Regulatory & Ethical De-risking: Built-in GDPR compliance and Explainable AI (SHAP) frameworks to ensure all models meet the high transparency standards required in the financial sector.
axa_business_3: Infrastructure Scalability: Leveraged distributed computing (PySpark) and Cloud clusters (AWS) to process massive datasets, ensuring performance does not degrade as business volume grows.
axa_business_4: Decision Support: Translated complex neural network outputs into executive-level Streamlit dashboards, aligning technical performance with stakeholder KPIs.
